adventure.title: Kosovo Mountains & Canyon Road Trip
adventure.subtitle: Explore Kosovo beyond the cities — Rugova Canyon, Sharr peaks, lakes, and alpine trails.

seo.title: Kosovo Road Trip — Mountains, Canyons & Lakes Adventure
seo.description: Plan a Kosovo road trip with GPS stops, Rugova Canyon, Sharr Mountains, lakes, and scenic routes.
seo.intro: Explore Kosovo beyond the cities with this nature and mountain adventure route.

places.name: Rugova Canyon
places.description: A dramatic limestone gorge at the edge of the Accursed Mountains, ideal for hiking and scenic drives.
places.seo_phrase: Rugova Canyon — Kosovo Road Trip Stop 1

places.name: Mirusha Waterfalls
places.description: A chain of sixteen terraced waterfalls cascading through a forested canyon.
places.seo_phrase: Mirusha Waterfalls — Kosovo Road Trip Stop 2

places.name: Gadime Marble Cave
places.description: An illuminated underground cave system filled with stalactites, stalagmites, and aragonite crystals.
places.seo_phrase: Gadime Marble Cave — Kosovo Road Trip Stop 3

places.name: Brezovica Ski Resort
places.description: A high-altitude resort in the Sharr Mountains offering alpine meadows and winter sports.
places.seo_phrase: Brezovica Ski Resort — Kosovo Road Trip Stop 4

places.name: Sharr Mountains National Park
places.description: Expansive alpine landscapes with wildflower meadows, shepherds' trails, and panoramic ridge views.
places.seo_phrase: Sharr Mountains National Park — Kosovo Road Trip Stop 5

places.name: Radavc Cave and Spring
places.description: The powerful spring where the White Drin river emerges from a mountainside cave.
places.seo_phrase: Radavc Cave and Spring — Kosovo Road Trip Stop 6

places.name: Batllava Lake
places.description: A popular reservoir lake with beaches, picnic areas, and mountain-framed swimming spots.
places.seo_phrase: Batllava Lake — Kosovo Road Trip Stop 7

places.name: Bear Sanctuary Prishtina
places.description: A forested sanctuary rescuing former captive brown bears, open for guided nature walks.
places.seo_phrase: Bear Sanctuary Prishtina — Kosovo Road Trip Stop 8

places.name: Gazivoda Lake
places.description: Kosovo's largest lake, ringed by rolling hills and quiet roads perfect for a scenic road trip.
places.seo_phrase: Gazivoda Lake — Kosovo Road Trip Stop 9

places.name: White Drin Canyon
places.description: Kosovo's only river canyon, with steep limestone walls and the historic Fshajt Bridge nearby.
places.seo_phrase: White Drin Canyon — Kosovo Road Trip Stop 10
